intro: Join Whiskerburg’s next big detective adventure!
description:
Play as Kat, a brave newcomer ready to solve the town’s trickiest cases. 
Find hidden objects, uncover clues, and help a bunch of cute cat friends including noble Sir Whiskers, elegant Duchess Purrcilla, and bubbly Mittens.

Each mystery you solve brings Kat closer to rising through the detective ranks and helps her fix her new office. 
With easy-to-play, whimsical characters, and stories that are warm and funny, this cat detective adventure is sure to make you smile from beginning to end.

Features:
- 15 beautiful Hidden Object scenes to explore
- 15 fun Item Matching scenes to enjoy
- Help Whiskerburg’s quirky cats solve 7 cozy cases
- 15 Triple Tile levels plus 7 relaxing jigsaw puzzles
- Gorgeous hand-crafted visuals and immersive sound design
